app.name: WAKI
home.nudge: Wonhwɛɛ wo tebea ɛnnɛ. Ɛte sɛn?
home.quote: Woyɛ ade pa sene wo dwene.
consent.title: Ansa na yɛahyɛ ase
consent.noticeCompanion: WAKI yɛ yɔnko a ɔbɛboa wo, ɛnyɛ dɔkota anaa therapist.
consent.noticePrivacy: Wo data bɛtena wo phone yi so — yɛremfa nkɔ baabiara kwa.
consent.noticeCrisis: Sɛ wohia mmoa ntɛm a, app no bɛkyerɛ wo crisis contacts daa.
consent.toggleLocal: Kora mood data wɔ phone yi so
consent.toggleLocalHint: Ɛho hia ma check-in, mood tracking, ne nkɔmɔbɔ.
consent.toggleTrainHint: Kyɛ usage nsɛm a yɛayi din afiri mu (ɛnyɛ wo nkɔmɔbɔ anaa wo ho nsɛm).
consent.toggleCloudHint: Wopɛ a. Kora wo data wɔ cloud so na woatumi anya no wɔ phone foforɔ so.
firstCheckin.title: Ɛte sɛn seesei?
firstCheckin.subtitle: Yɛmfa check-in tiawa bi nhyɛ ase. Paw tebea a ɛbɛn wo kɛseɛ no.
onboarding.languageSubtitle: {{roster}}. Kɔ so na paw nea wopɛ — wobetumi asesa eyi bio wɔ wo profile mu.
onboarding.nicknameSubtitle: Din yi na ɛkora wɔ wo device nko ara so.
checkin.title: Ɛte sɛn?
checkin.subtitle: Paw nea ɛbɛn wo tebea kɛseɛ seesei.
checkin.followUpLabel: Wopɛ sɛ woka biribi ka ho? (wopɛ a)
checkin.savedBody: Meda wo ase sɛ wo gyinaa tiawa bi hwɛɛ wo ho.
conversation.safeguard: WAKI nyɛ dɔkota anaa crisis service. Sɛ wo wɔ asiane mu a, frɛ 999.
crisis.title: Wo ho yɛ wo anaa seesei?
crisis.headline: Wonko.
crisis.subline: Sɛ wofrɛ mmoa a, ɛyɛ akokoduro.
crisis.safetyQuestion: Wo ho yɛ wo anaa seesei?
crisis.barText: Sɛ wo wɔ ɔhaw mu a, mmoa wɔ hɔ ma wo.
crisis.footer: WAKI nyɛ crisis service. Sɛ wowɔ asiane mu a, frɛ emergency services.
toolkit.title: Mmoa Nnwinnade
toolkit.subtitle: Nhyehyɛeɛ a ɛbɛboa wo na wo bo adwo.
profile.localData: Wo data nyinaa te saa phone yi mu
profile.sessionBody: Fi session no mu na sesa nea wɔakora so, na san kɔ onboarding so.
profile.logoutBody: Yei bɛpepa session a wɔakora wɔ phone yi so na woatumi afi onboarding ase bio.
settings.title: Nhyehyɛeɛ
settings.privacyLocal: Kora nsɛm wura afidie yi so
settings.privacyTrain: Mmoa a wɔayi din afiri mu
settings.notificationHint: Nya nkaebɔ brɛoo sɛ wo nhwɛ wo ho daa
settings.backupRestore: Fa sie na san fa ba
settings.dataExportHint: Download wo mood nsɛm ne sessions
settings.exportReady: Wo data export no ayɛ krado.
settings.exportFallback: Sharing nni hɔ wɔ device yi so. Wɔayɛ wo export no wɔ: {{path}}
settings.restoreDataHint: Paw WAKI backup file bi fi device yi so
settings.restoring: Yɛresan de wo backup no aba...
settings.restoreReady: Wɔasan de wo backup no aba.
settings.restoreFailed: Yɛantumi ansan ammfa backup file no amma.
settings.deleteAllBody: Yei bɛpepa wo mood check-in, nkɔmɔbɔ, ne nhyehyɛeɛ nyinaa daa. Worentumi ansan anya.
learn.title: Sua
learn.subtitle: Te wo adwene ase. Asɛm biako biako.
stories.title: Nsɛm
stories.subtitle: Nnipa te sɛ wo a wɔhyiaa nsɛm bi.
audio.playbackError: Yɛantumi ammoa audio yi seesei. Mesrɛ wo san bɔ mmɔden bio.
offline.banner: Wo nni intɛnɛt so. Nneɛma bi rentumi nyɛ adwuma.
permission.micBody: WAKI hia microphone ama voice nkɔmɔbɔ.
safeguard.statement: WAKI nyɛ dɔkota anaa crisis service. Sɛ wohia mmoa ntɛm a, frɛ 999.
